bindings.quest_action: follow the secret trail and find evidence of what they're hiding
bindings.quest_focus: secret weekly trips and a locked chest of supplies
bindings.quest_stakes: if they're stockpiling to sell behind our backs, the whole settlement suffers
bindings.quest_threat: a neighbor whose guilty behavior and secrecy point to betrayal
bindings.quest_origin: weeks of watching suspicious patterns that don't add up

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I need someone from outside {location} for this. Someone with no loyalties here, no bias.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} has been making {quest_focus} every week {location_hint}. Won't say where, won't say why. After {quest_origin}, I'm certain something is wrong. I think {quest_stakes}. I need proof before I go to the council. I need you to {quest_action} and bring me evidence. Bring {quest_item} to justify the investigation.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_threat} is too obvious to ignore. I need the truth, whatever it is.

playerResponses.text: I'll find out the truth, whatever it is.
Spying on your neighbor? This feels wrong. But I'll look.
Sort out your own grudges. I'm not getting involved.

bindings.quest_action: investigate the supply chain and prove market manipulation
bindings.quest_focus: the suspicion that a rival cook is cornering suppliers to drive me under
bindings.quest_stakes: ten years of building this business could be destroyed by a scheme
bindings.quest_threat: redirected shipments and declining quality that appeared when the rival arrived
bindings.quest_origin: two months of watching my pantry quality drop as the new cook thrives

dialogueChunks.intro: Something isn't right in {location}, {player_name}, and I think I'm the only one who sees it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The new cook, {target_npc}, arrived two months ago and suddenly everyone loves them. But {quest_origin}. I think {quest_focus}: they're buying out the suppliers {location_hint} and selling at a loss to drive me under. The {enemy_type} on the trade roads make it impossible for me to {quest_action} in person.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes}. I'm not going to lose it to someone's scheme without a fight.

playerResponses.text: Competition can be cutthroat. I'll look into the supply chain.
Or maybe they're just a better cook. But fine, I'll check.
Business disputes aren't my area. Work it out yourselves.

bindings.quest_action: follow the trail of secret meetings and unaccounted ledger entries
bindings.quest_focus: large quantities of supplies marked outbound with no buyer listed
bindings.quest_stakes: a lifelong friendship may be built on a lie
bindings.quest_threat: secret meetings at odd hours in places nobody else frequents
bindings.quest_origin: unrecognized ledger entries and evasive behavior from a trusted friend

dialogueChunks.intro: I've been losing sleep over this, {player_name}. Tossing and turning every night, running the same thoughts in circles.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: My oldest friend, {target_npc}, has been meeting with traders in secret. I found {quest_focus} in the tavern ledger. When I asked, they changed the subject. {quest_threat} happen {location_hint}, and the {enemy_type} activity means nobody else goes that way. I need you to {quest_action} and bring back {quest_item} to account for the discrepancy.

playerResponses.text: I'll follow the trail and get you answers.
Have you tried just talking to them honestly?
Suspicion can poison a friendship faster than any betrayal. Leave me out of it.
